title: The Taris Holofeed: Siege Edition
content:
{{Top|rwm|old}}
'''The Taris Holofeed: Siege Edition''' was the issue of the ''[[Taris Holofeed]]'' released with [[Knights of the Old Republic 15|''Knights of the Old Republic'' 15]].
